summary.zh-CN: 本次更新重点优化了评论与工作流通知的上下文信息和提示文案，并收紧了评审内部问题的公开权限，减少误通知与误公开。
summary.en: This release focuses on clearer context and copy in comment and workflow notifications, while tightening publication rules for reviewer-only issues to reduce accidental alerts and unintended exposure.

title.zh-CN: 评论通知现在会显示更完整的上下文
title.en: Comment notifications now include fuller context

description.zh-CN: 评论相关的飞书 / Webhook 通知现在会显示对应曲目、问题上下文和操作人，群消息里更容易判断是哪首曲子、哪条问题发生了新的互动。
description.en: Feishu and webhook notifications for comments now include the related track, issue context, and actor, making it much easier to tell which track and which issue a new interaction belongs to at a glance.

title.zh-CN: 修复评论通知偶发重复发送

description.zh-CN: 修复了同一条评论在外部通知渠道中偶发重复推送的问题，避免群内短时间收到两条内容相同的提醒。
description.en: Fixed an issue where the same comment could occasionally be pushed twice through external notification channels, avoiding back-to-back duplicate alerts in group chats.

title.zh-CN: 自动流程通知文案更清晰

description.zh-CN: 需要手动指派评审人、评审重新开启、内部讨论问题自动结案、同行评审人数达标等自动通知已改为更清晰的表述，并会显示触发本次流程推进的操作人。
description.en: Automatic notifications for manual reviewer assignment, reopened reviews, automatic closure of internal-discussion issues, and peer-review quorum now use clearer wording and show who triggered the workflow progression.

title.zh-CN: 收紧评审内部问题的公开权限
title.en: Publishing reviewer-only issues is now more restricted

description.zh-CN: 处于“待讨论”或“内部结案”状态的问题，现在只有问题创建者可以重新发布为公开问题，避免其他评审误将仅内部可见的问题暴露给曲师。
description.en: Issues in "pending discussion" or "internally resolved" states can now only be republished as public issues by their original author, preventing other reviewers from accidentally exposing reviewer-only content to submitters.
